name: Kyrus Ironscale
sd_appearance: A towering Dragonborn clad in deep burgundy and gunmetal, Kyrus Ironscale, stands amidst the Undercity's marketplace. His crimson scales glisten under the dim Dome light, a scar running down his left cheek adding an air of mystery to his imposing figure. Wearing a fine coat over leather armor, he carries a concealed blade at his waist and a crossbow slung across his back, the Iron Fang mark subtle on his lapel. One distinctive visual detail stands out - a black feather, a token of a past deal, tucked into the belt at his waist.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: mercantile-military — expensive but practical, always armed, never obviously so
